title: Tragacantha testiculata
taxonomy: Tragacantha testiculata is a species of plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and is commonly known as the 'Caterpillar Plant' or 'Caterpillar Weed'. The plant's classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Fabales. Tragacantha testiculata is a member of the genus Cynodon in some classifications, but others consider it to be part of the genus Tragacantha. Further research may be necessary to confirm its exact classification.
